title: coeloglossum albidum
intro: Coeloglossum albidum, also known as the summer orchid or pale fragrant orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Coeloglossum albidum include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health conditions.
